collect.long: Collect and aggregate data from GitHub, BitcoinTalk, market APIs, academic papers, and other sources into a local directory for analysis.

flag.dry_run: Show what would be collected without writing

bitcointalk.long: Scrape posts from a BitcoinTalk forum topic by topic ID or URL. Supports pagination for large threads.

flag.pages: Maximum number of pages to collect (0 for all)

dispatch.long: Manually emit a collection lifecycle event (start, progress, item, error, complete) to trigger registered hooks.

register.short: Register a hook for an event type

excavate.short: Deep-collect all sources for a project
excavate.long: Run all configured collectors for a known project (e.g. bitcoin, ethereum). Combines GitHub, market, and paper sources into a single pass with resumable state.

flag.scan_only: Scan available sources without collecting data

github.short: Collect issues and PRs from GitHub
github.long: Collect issues, pull requests, and metadata from a GitHub repository or organisation. Requires a valid GITHUB_TOKEN.

flag.org: Treat the argument as an organisation name

market.short: Collect market data for a coin
market.long: Fetch price, volume, and market capitalisation data for a cryptocurrency from CoinGecko and other market APIs.

papers.long: Search and download academic papers from arXiv, Semantic Scholar, and other sources. Requires a query term.

flag.source: Paper source to search (arXiv, semantic-scholar, or all)

process.long: Transform and normalise previously collected raw data into structured formats suitable for analysis or training.
